zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Alan Stewart of Dreghorn於大約1272年出生在英國蘇格蘭艾斯爾德雷時，他的父親Sir John Stewart, Lord of Bonkyll and Garlies28歲，母親Lady Margaret de Bonkyl24歲。他於1320年與Marion Cameron在蘇格蘭雷福福爾達利結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1333年7月19日在英國英格蘭諾圖波藍德貝維其可-朋-特維德享年62歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Alan Stewart of Dreghorn于大约1272年出生在英国苏格兰艾斯爾德雷时，他的父亲Sir John Stewart, Lord of Bonkyll and Garlies28岁，母亲Lady Margaret de Bonkyl24岁。他于1320年与Marion Cameron在苏格兰雷福福爾達利结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1333年7月19日在英国英格兰諾圖波藍德貝維其可-朋-特維德享年62岁，埋葬在苏格兰。

nameMeanings.name: Stewart
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish (Lanarkshire) and English: originally an occupational name for an administrative official of an estate, from Middle English stiward, Old English stigweard, stīweard, a compound of stig ‘house(hold)’ + weard ‘guardian’. In the Anglo-Saxon period this title was used of an officer controlling the domestic affairs of a household, especially of the royal household; after the Norman Conquest it was also used more widely as the native equivalent of Seneschal, for the steward of a manor or manager of an estate. In Scotland the term was also used of a magistrate originally appointed by the king to administer crown lands, forming a stewartry.

History: Stuart or Stewart is the surname of one of the great families of Scotland, the royal family of Scotland from the 14th century, and of England from 1603, when James VI of Scotland acceded to the English throne as James I. There were many minor branches of the family left in Britain after the flight of James II in 1688, but not every bearer of the surname can claim relationship with the royal house, even in Scotland. Every great house in medieval England and Scotland had its steward, and in many cases the office gave rise to a hereditary surname. The fall of the house of Stuart in Britain, conversely, led to the establishment of several highly placed branches bearing this surname in continental Europe, which are in most cases related to the old Scottish royal family.

variants.name: Stuart
meanings: Scottish (Aberdeenshire and Banffshire): variant of   Stewart  . This French form of the name, there being no W in the French language, was adopted by Mary, Queen of Scots, on her return to Scotland in 1561 and has since come to be more popular among royalists than the earlier spellings.
History: Stuart or Stewart is the surname of one of the great families of Scotland (see note at   Stewart  ).

variants.name: Stewardson
meanings: English (Lancashire and Westmorland): patronymic from Middle English stiward ‘steward’ (see Stewart ) + -son ‘son of the steward’.

variants.name: Steward
meanings: English (London and East Anglia): variant of   Stewart  .

nameMeanings.name: Alan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of Celtic origin and uncertain derivation (possibly a diminutive of a word meaning ‘rock’). It was introduced into England by Breton followers of William the Conqueror , most notably Alan , Earl of Brittany, who was rewarded for his services with vast estates in the newly conquered kingdom. In Britain the variants Allan and Allen are considerably less frequent, and generally represent transferred uses of surname forms, whereas in America all three forms of the name are approximately equally common. See also Alun .

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Alan Stewart of Dreghorn was born about 1272, in Dreghorn, Ayrshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, his father, Sir John Stewart, Lord of Bonkyll and Garlies, was 28 and his mother, Lady Margaret de Bonkyl, was 24. He married Marion Cameron in 1320, in Darnley, Renfrewshire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 19 July 1333, in Berwick-upon-Tweed, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 62, and was buried in Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Alan Stewart of Dreghorn est né environ 1272, à Dreghorn, Ayrshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir John Stewart, Lord of Bonkyll and Garlies, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Lady Margaret de Bonkyl, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Marion Cameron en 1320, à Darnley, Renfrewshire, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 19 juillet 1333, à Berwick-upon-Tweed, Northumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 62 ans, et a été enterré à Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Alan Stewart of Dreghorn um 1272 in Dreghorn, Ayrshire, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir John Stewart, Lord of Bonkyll and Garlies 28 und seine Mutter Lady Margaret de Bonkyl 24. Er hat 1320 in Darnley, Renfrewshire, Scotland Marion Cameron geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 19. Juli 1333 im Alter von 62 Jahren in Berwick-upon-Tweed, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Alan Stewart of Dreghorn è nato il circa 1272 nel Dreghorn, Ayrshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Sir John Stewart, Lord of Bonkyll and Garlies, aveva 28 anni e il suo madre, Lady Margaret de Bonkyl, aveva 24 anni. Lui sposato Marion Cameron nel 1320, nel Darnley, Renfrewshire, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 19 luglio 1333, nel Berwick-upon-Tweed, Northumberland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 62 anni, e fu sepolto a Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Alan Stewart of Dreghornが約1272年にイギリススコットランドエイルシュアイアドレグホールンで生まれた時，父Sir John Stewart, Lord of Bonkyll and Garliesは28歳，母Lady Margaret de Bonkylは24歳であった。1320年にスコットランドレンフリューシュアイアダルンリーでMarion Cameronと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1333年7月19日にイギリスイギリスノースウンバーランドバーウィク-ウプオン-トウィードで62歳で死去し，スコットランドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Alan Stewart of Dreghorn(이)가 대략 1272년 영국 스코틀랜드 에이르실르 드레고른에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John Stewart, Lord of Bonkyll and Garlies(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Margaret de Bonkyl(은)는 24세였다. 그는 1320년 스컷랜드 렌프레w실르 더른리에서 Marion Cameron(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1333년 7월 19일 영국 잉글랜드 노르스벌랜드 버윅-업-트위드에서 62세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Alan Stewart of Dreghorn nasceu aproximadamente 1272, em Dreghorn, Ayrshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir John Stewart, Lord of Bonkyll and Garlies, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Lady Margaret de Bonkyl, tinha 24 anos. Ele casou-se com Marion Cameron em 1320, em Darnley, Renfrewshire, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 19 de julho de 1333, em Berwick-upon-Tweed, Northumberland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 62 anos, e foi sepultado em Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Alan Stewart of Dreghorn родился около 1272 г. в местности дрегаурн, аиршир, Шотландия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir John Stewart, Lord of Bonkyll and Garlies было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Margaret de Bonkyl, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Marion Cameron в 1320 г. в местности дарнли, ренфрюшир, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер 19 июля 1333 г. в местности бирвикк-упон-твид, нортумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 62 лет и был похоронен в местности Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Alan Stewart of Dreghorn nació aproximadamente 1272, en Dreghorn, Ayrshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir John Stewart, Lord of Bonkyll and Garlies, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Lady Margaret de Bonkyl, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Marion Cameron en 1320, en Darnley, Renfrewshire, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 19 de julio de 1333, en Berwick-upon-Tweed, Northumberland, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 62 años, y fue sepultado en Scotland.
